message:
fix(core): update connection.rs col_map construction to match 3-tuple format

Align UPDATE col_map building with the new (table, column, ambiguous)
3-tuple format introduced in the earlier col_map refactor. Also fix
destructuring pattern in should_coerce_for_comparison to extract all
three tuple elements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
